'''raduchu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:load|load]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-d-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:load|load]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| raduchu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:rædichith|rædichith]] || [[word:rædichij|rædichij]] || [[word:rædichish|rædichish]] || [[word:rædichi|rædichi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:raduduchuth|raduduchuth]] || [[word:raduduchuj|raduduchuj]] || [[word:raduduchush|raduduchush]] || [[word:raduduchu|raduduchu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:raduchuth|raduchuth]] || [[word:raduchuj|raduchuj]] || [[word:raduchush|raduchush]] || [[word:raduchu|raduchu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:radufchuth|radufchuth]] || [[word:radufchuj|radufchuj]] || [[word:radufchush|radufchush]] || [[word:radufchuf|radufchuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:raduchuthu|raduchuthu]] || [[word:raduchuju|raduchuju]] || [[word:raduchushu|raduchushu]] || [[word:raduchuku|raduchuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:raduchuth|raduchuth]] || [[word:raduchuj|raduchuj]] || [[word:raduchush|raduchush]] || [[word:raduchu|raduchu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:raduchuthul|raduchuthul]] || [[word:raduchujul|raduchujul]] || [[word:raduchushul|raduchushul]] || [[word:raduchukul|raduchukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:raduchuthuthu|raduchuthuthu]] || [[word:raduchujuju|raduchujuju]] || [[word:raduchushushu|raduchushushu]] || [[word:raduchuku|raduchuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:raduchuthun|raduchuthun]] || [[word:raduchujun|raduchujun]] || [[word:raduchushun|raduchushun]] || [[word:raduchukun|raduchukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:raduchuthuoro|raduchuthuoro]] || [[word:raduchujuoro|raduchujuoro]] || [[word:raduchushuoro|raduchushuoro]] || [[word:raduchukuoro|raduchukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
